fields.description: Activity-form field to test. Options are filled in from the chosen task type's schema by the builder.
fields.label: Field

fields.description: Comparison operator (Frappe native filter set). ALL criteria on a rule must match.
fields.label: Operator
fields.options:
=
!=
<
>
<=
>=
like
not like
in
not in
is set
is unset
between

fields.description: The value to compare against. Blank for the is set / is unset operators.
fields.label: Value
